DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. DEFENSE CASE CONTINUED; ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. REQUEST BY COMMUNITY NEWS SERVICE FOR ORDER ALLOWING FILMING OF PART OF PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED BY COURT. DEFENSE CASE CONCLUDED, REBUTTAL EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY PLTF. TRIAL CONTINUED TO 11-30-94, 10AM IN DEPT 3.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAVAIFIATOA, ALMA DOES 1 TO 5 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 222 SCHWERIN STREET #1502B, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $3,254.20 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,254.20, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT ALMA TAVAIFIATOA LIABLE FOR AN ADDITIONAL $35.00 IN BACK RENT. COSTS AWARDED TO PLTFF PER COST BILL. DAILY DAMAGES FROM 12-1-94 THROUGH/INCLUDING 1-23-95 (54 DAYS AT RATE OF $6.30/DAY) IN AMOUNT OF $340.20 INCLUDED IN TOTAL DAMAGES AMOUNT OF $3254.20.
1ST REQUEST SENT TO REPORTER FOR ESTIMATE
